Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • apm_domain_id - (Required) (Updatable) The APM Domain ID the request is intended for.
  • content - (Required) (Updatable) The content of the script. It may contain custom-defined tags for setting dynamic parameters.
  • content_type - (Required) (Updatable) Content type of the script. Supported values are SIDE, JS, and PLAYWRIGHT_TS.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource. Each key is predefined and scoped to a namespace.
  • display_name - (Required) (Updatable) Unique name that can be edited. The name should not contain any confidential information.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Simple key-value pair that is applied without any predefined name, type, or scope.
  • content_file_name - (Optional) (Updatable) File name of the uploaded script content.
  • parameters - (Optional) (Updatable) List of script parameters used to overwrite defaults in the script content.
    • is_secret - (Optional) (Updatable) If the parameter value is secret and should be kept confidential, set this field to true.
    • param_name - (Required) (Updatable) Name of the parameter.
    • param_value - (Optional) (Updatable) Value of the parameter.
